response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack work, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js/React product development and, notably, current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience — a rare match for the role's AI agent development requirement. Testing craftsmanship (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), cloud (AWS CDK), containers (Docker, Kubernetes), and MongoDB/MySQL all align well. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, and Kotlin experience, and a notable share of past frontend work in Ember and niche D-lang rather than the target stack.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with current TypeScript/Node.js/React work plus AI-agent and MCP tooling
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries, and taught testing workshops
Solid cloud and infrastructure exposure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) with MongoDB/MySQL database experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and testing tools listed do not include Vitest or Playwright
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure appears limited and dated, weakening the secondary-stack fit
Considerable career investment in niche technologies (D-lang, Ember) rather than the role's primary stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
